root_text.an6.140:1.3: Dassanānuttariyaṁ, savanānuttariyaṁ, lābhānuttariyaṁ, sikkhānuttariyaṁ, pāricariyānuttariyaṁ, anussatānuttariyaṁ.
root_text.an6.140:1.4: Rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime cha dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an6.140:1.1: “For insight into greed, six things should be developed.
translation_text.an6.140:1.3: The unsurpassable seeing, listening, acquisition, training, service, and recollection.
translation_text.an6.140:1.4: For insight into greed, these six things should be developed.”
